Компания АО «МРТС» создана в 1999 году,:
The company MRTS JSC was established in 1999, has many years of experience in the construction of trunk pipelines and the implementation of underwater
technical work in the Far North and other extreme climatic and hydrogeological conditions. Since 2004
MRTS JSC specializes in work at sea.
АО «МРТС» осуществляет строительство под:
MRTS JSC carries out the construction of subsea facilities for trunk pipelines of the oil and gas production complex,
including installation of fiber optic cables and umbilicals; complex dredging works with backfilling of trenches;
construction of sea port hydraulic structures in the Arctic and subarctic regions; construction of artificial land
structures, wave protection and ice-protection.
Компания имеет постоянно действующие баз:
The company has permanent bases and representative offices in Moscow, St. Petersburg, Arkhangelsk, Yuzhno-Sakhalinsk, Surgut, Sabetta.
MRTS cooperates with Russian experts and research institutes in Russia.
